nf-word: color: var(--red); font-family: var(--font); font-weight: 900; font-size: 22px; letter-spacing: 1px;
hero-fade: position: absolute; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; height: 45%; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(20,20,20,0) 0%, rgba(20,20,20,0.6) 50%, var(--canvas) 100%); z-index: 2;
hero-top: position: absolute; top: 48px; left: 0; right: 0; display: flex; justify-content: center; z-index: 5;
top10-badge: position: absolute; top: 90px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; z-index: 5;
top10-chip: background: var(--red); color: #fff; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 800; padding: 3px 6px; border-radius: 2px; letter-spacing: 0.4px;
top10-text: font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
hero-title: position: absolute; left: 0; right: 0; top: 140px; text-align: center; z-index: 5; padding: 0 24px;
hero-title-art: font-family: var(--font); font-size: 34px; font-weight: 900; color: #fff; letter-spacing: -1.2px; line-height: 1; text-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
hero-sub: position: absolute; left: 0; right: 0; top: 210px; text-align: center; z-index: 5;
hero-tag: position: absolute; left: 0; right: 0; top: 230px; text-align: center; z-index: 5; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; color: #AAAAAA;
hero-btns: position: absolute; left: 16px; right: 16px; bottom: 20px; display: flex; gap: 8px; z-index: 5;
hero-btn: flex: 1; padding: 10px 0; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-align: center; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px;
cw-tile: width: 90px; height: 52px; border-radius: 2px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; flex-shrink: 0;
cw-prog: position: absolute; left: 0; bottom: 0; height: 2px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); width: 100%;
top10-cell: display: flex; align-items: flex-end; position: relative; width: 100px; height: 92px; flex-shrink: 0;
top10-numeral: font-family: var(--font); font-weight: 900; font-size: 110px; line-height: 0.85; color: transparent; -webkit-text-stroke: 2px #fff; letter-spacing: -8px; position: relative; z-index: 1; margin-right: -32px; opacity: 0.95;
top10-poster: width: 58px; height: 88px; border-radius: 3px; position: relative; z-index: 2; flex-shrink: 0;
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; color: var(--text-tertiary); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500;
